Wanderworld uses selected Kenney asset packs distributed under Creative Commons Zero (CC0 1.0).

Source packs used:
- Blocky Characters
- Cube Pets
- City Kit Suburban
- Car Kit
- Fantasy Town Kit
- Platformer Kit
- Graveyard Kit

Credit: Kenney / www.kenney.nl
The complete source-pack license texts are preserved in ./licenses/.
